title: Support IEEE Std 1800-2017, section 27.5, Conditional generate constructs

features.name: nested if-else-if generate with named begin:end block
features.description: Code should include nested if-else-if generate constructs using if (condition) begin : name ... end else if (condition) begin : name ... end else ; pattern

features.name: case statement inside generate block with named begin:end
features.description: Code should include a case statement inside a generate block using case (expr) values: begin : name ... end default: begin : name ... endcase pattern

features.name: hierarchical reference to generate instance with dot notation
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical reference to an instance inside a generate construct using dotted path like test.u1.foo
